logic_gaps.description: JSONL schema enforcement gap: the deep_start-review-loop YAML workflow (auto + confirm) assumes specific JSONL record shapes with required fields (type/event/mode/sessionId/etc.) but the reducer's parseJsonlDetailed function at scripts/reduce-state.cjs:127-151 validates JSON SYNTAX only, not SCHEMA compliance. Malformed records missing required fields pass through silently; downstream consumers (dashboard, analysis tools) may encounter undefined-field-access errors. state_format.md §3 defines required fields but no runtime validator enforces them.

novel_findings: **META-PATTERN 1: Gate-model drift cluster.** Four gaps (LG-0013 + LG-0016 + LG-0031 + LG-0032) share a single root cause: the legal-stop gate model was extended from 3→7 gates but propagation was incomplete across feature_catalog, playbook DRV-018, convergence.md (within-doc), loop_protocol.md (within-doc). Coordinated remediation: reconcile all surfaces against the AUTHORITATIVE 7-gate event shape at convergence.md:105-117.

**META-PATTERN 2: Documentation-promise-no-implementation cluster.** Three gaps (LG-0022 + LG-0004 + LG-0006) share the pattern where docs describe behavior with no runtime implementation (security-sensitive overrides, graphEvents processing, traceabilityChecks). Either implement (out of scope per ADR-002) or mark docs as SPEC ONLY / future-implementation. Synthesis applies the mark-as-SPEC option inline for LG-0022.

**META-PATTERN 3: Path-reference staleness from skill split.** Five gaps (LG-0017 + LG-0018 + LG-0019 + LG-0020 + LG-0025) stem from incomplete path updates during deep-research → deep-review skill split and AF-0023 migration. LG-0025 fixed inline during iter 6. LG-0017..LG-0020 mechanical P2 fixes applied at synthesis. Class-of-bug: search-replace operations missed prose-style references (SOURCE METADATA blocks) while updating command-line references.

Phase 5 stop reason: ADR-001 mandated 10 iters complete (no early-stop). Convergence signal: iter 8 (zero gaps) + iter 9 (only within-doc cross-references) + iter 10 (only 1 novel gap + 3 meta-pattern aggregations) confirms the loop is saturated. Truly novel-gap rate dropped from 8 (iter 1) to 1 (iter 10).
notes: Iter 10 capstone. Wall-clock 110s. Surfaced LG-0033 (JSONL schema enforcement gap, P1) and aggregated all 32 prior gaps into 3 meta-patterns (gate-model drift, doc-promise-no-impl, path-ref staleness). Phase 5 ENDS HERE. Total: 33 cumulative gaps (3 P0 + 15 P1 + 15 P2) across 10 iters.
